summary: A blue sedan approaches an intersection on a two-lane road, executes a left turn, and subsequently crashes into a barrier, resulting in significant damage.

events_timeline.event: The blue sedan travels along the road and makes a left turn at the intersection.
The vehicle crashes into a barrier upon completing the left turn.

uncertainties: Exact nature of the crash post-crash is unclear.
Damage extent beyond the barrier is unknown.

risk_assessment.why: The vehicle crashes into a barrier, indicating a loss of control and potential injury risk.
